{{Quote|We've located Moff Jarnek on Spirador, and we need to go over a plan to apprehend him.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="TLoLS">''[[A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker]]''</ref>}}
'''Spirador''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Tandon sector/Legends|Tandon sector]] and the site of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Harlov Jarnek]]'s palace.

{{Planet-stub}}
